title: Oklahoma City Heat Wave
lead: Oklahoma City is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.00. This event has reached a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in Oklahoma City has led to extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 9.5 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 44%, and wind speed is at 19.5 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The absence of Heating Degree Days (HDD) at 0.0 GG further emphasizes the severity of the heat wave.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
